reason: A spin doctor fabricates war to manipulate public opinion, exposing slippery ethics and empty patriotism.
An editor stumbles on a presidential secret, unleashing a chain of backroom lies among powerful fixers.
A brainwashed war veteran’s political return reveals a web of deceit woven by ambitious insiders.
A president’s covert war protocol unravels corporate and military alliances in a cynical, power-driven plot.
A conspiracy theorist forges perilous truths, ensnaring government agents in a maze of paranoia and manipulation.
A dusty Texas sheriff uncovers a decades-old skeleton, sparking political cover-ups among equally tainted players.
A scandalous quiz show ripples through 1950s America, revealing journalists, producers, and politicians all complicit.
Behind a murder trial, judges, lawyers, and litigants each pursue hidden agendas in a chilling game of influence.
A naive senator’s hearings turn into a backroom spectacle where everyone’s ambition drips with moral compromise.
An American lawyer runs afoul of Beijing’s courts, revealing judicial machinations and fragile pretenses of justice.
